name: Fail2Ban IP Banned
description: Detects when Fail2Ban has banned an IP address due to excessive failed authentication attempts. This indicates potential brute-force activity.

prompts.prompt: Fail2Ban has banned an IP address due to excessive failed authentication attempts, indicating a potential brute-force attack. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Source IP** {source_address}, **Destination IP** {destination_address}, **Port** {port}, **Service Name** {service_name}, **Ban Duration** {duration}, **Matched Rule** {matched_rule}, **Country** {country}. Investigate this credential access attempt.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp when the IP was banned.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The IP address that was banned.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address targeted by the brute-force attempt.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port targeted by the brute-force attempt.

parameters.name: service_name
parameters.description: The service (e.g., SSH, FTP) that detected the failed attempts.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: The duration for which the IP is banned.

parameters.name: matched_rule
parameters.description: The Fail2Ban rule that triggered the ban.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: The country associated with the banned IP address (via geoip).
